Lisa Daily Medication & Treatment Checklist Medication / Treatment Type Morning Noon Evening Bedtime PRN / Notes Brovana (arformoterol) Nebulizer ■ ■ 2 mL Pulmicort (budesonide) Nebulizer ■ ■ 2 mL Yupelri (revefenacin) Nebulizer ■ 3 mL Albuterol inhaler Inhaler ■ PRN breathing DuoNeb Nebulizer ■ PRN breathing Ipratropium nasal spray Nasal Spray ■ ■ ■ 2 sprays Theophylline 300mg Pill ■ Prednisone taper Pill ■ AM w/ food Lisinopril-HCTZ Pill ■ Metoprolol 50mg Pill ■ ■ Aspirin 162mg Pill ■ Atorvastatin 20mg Pill ■ Metformin 500mg Pill ■ ■ With meals Gabapentin 200mg Capsule ■ ■ ■ Guaifenesin Liquid ■ ■ ■ ■ Mucus relief Omeprazole 40mg Capsule ■ Blood sugar check Test ■ 1x daily Bactrim DS Antibiotic ■ Mon/Wed/Fri only Dupixent Injection Every 14 days Morphine 5mg Liquid ■ PRN shortness of breath Norco 5/325 Pill ■ PRN knee pain SAFETY: Do NOT give Morphine and Norco close together unless physician specifically says to. Watch for excessive sleepiness, slowed breathing, confusion, blue lips, or hard-to-wake behavior. BMP lab due within 1 week for potassium check.
